Hi Ana. Thanks for joining. So, how long have you worked in quality assurance?
I have worked in QA for six years, and I have been in tech since 2018.
Impressive. And what is your area of expertise?
I have specialized in software testing. I have also led a small QA team since last year.
Great. Have you ever worked with a fully international team?
No, I have never worked abroad, but I have always wanted to. That is my next goal.
And what milestone are you most proud of?
I have mentored several junior testers, and I have earned two promotions. That means a lot to me.
I have worked in quality assurance for six years.
I have been in tech since 2018.
My expertise is software testing.
I have earned two promotions.
I have never worked abroad, but I have always wanted to.

Hi, I am Ana, and this is a short version of my career story. I have worked in quality assurance for more than six years, and I have been in technology since 2018. My background is in computer science. I have specialized in software testing, and testing is my area of expertise. Over the years, I have earned two promotions, and I have led a small QA team since last year. I have also mentored several junior testers. That is one of my favorite milestones. I have never worked with a fully international team, but that is exactly what I am looking for now. Thank you for listening.

Hi Ana, this is David Harper from the hiring team at Northwind. Thank you for your application for the remote QA Analyst role. I have reviewed your profile, and your experience looks strong. Before our interview on Thursday, I would like you to prepare a short version of your career story. Please tell me three things: how long you have worked in quality assurance, what your area of expertise is, and one milestone you have achieved. Keep it clear and use the present perfect. I am looking forward to hearing it. Talk soon.

First, David thanks Ana for her application and introduces the role. Then he asks how long she has worked in quality assurance. Next, Ana explains her experience and her area of expertise. After that, David asks if she has ever worked with an international team. Finally, they agree to continue the interview on Thursday.
